description: Adult bird with white face and neck, orange face skin and cere, yellow legs, mostly black body with fine bars on back, white primary panels, distinctive dark crown, white patch on tail with dark bar on the end of the tail feathers.  It was sitting on a wood post near a cattle birthing pen.  Flushed it and it went to a telephone poll about 100 meters away.  Private land within about 100m of a state wildlife area along the Rio Grande. No calls.  Private landowners said that it was feeding on the afterbirth from the calves. This is private land, exact location should not be shared!
photographer: Photographer: Cary Aloia, Cary Aloia, Cary Aloia, Cary Aloia, Cary Aloia, Cary Aloia
